summary: Iteration 157 — Pastry Gallery + Recurring Monthly Billing testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All routes verified (/pastry/gallery, /pastry/admin, /pastry, /). New features working: gallery list/patch/delete, billing dry-run/real-run, billing audit history.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/pastry/gallery returns items array with photoreal renders, sorted newest first ✓
GET /api/pastry/gallery?favorited_only=true correctly filters to favorited items only ✓
Dry-run billing does NOT create Stripe sessions (charged items have dry_run=True, no checkout_url) ✓
GET /api/pastry/billing/runs returns audit history sorted newest first ✓
/pastry/gallery renders with pastry-gallery-page testid, shows pinterest-style grid of cards ✓
/pastry/gallery card click opens detail modal with title/tags inputs, Save/Download/Delete buttons ✓
/pastry/gallery favorite toggle on card persists via PATCH and survives page reload ✓
/pastry/admin billing result panel (pastry-admin-billing-result) appears after dry-run showing charged count ✓
Regression: /pastry landing renders with pastry-hero-title, checkout button, inputs ✓
Regression: Root / dashboard loads successfully (no boot freeze) ✓
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data: rnd-demo-01 'Blush Peony Wedding' render, Sweet Haven Bakery and Rose Patisserie subscribers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter157 delivered Photo Gallery feature + Recurring Monthly Billing for Pastry Standalone. Gallery endpoints: GET /api/pastry/gallery (list with limit/favorited_only/email filters), PATCH /api/pastry/gallery/{render_id} (update title/tags/favorited), DELETE /api/pastry/gallery/{render_id}. Billing endpoints: POST /api/pastry/billing/run-monthly?dry_run=true|false (scans due subscribers, creates Stripe sessions for real run), GET /api/pastry/billing/runs (audit history). Frontend: /pastry/gallery shows masonry grid with favorite toggle, detail modal with Save/Download/Delete. /pastry/admin has Gallery link, Dry-run billing button, Run monthly billing button with confirm dialog, billing result panel. Seeded data: 5 cake renders in cake_renders collection (rnd-demo-01 favorited), 2 subscribers in pastry_subscribers (Sweet Haven, Rose Patisserie). Both subscribers have next_billing_at in the future (May 2026) so dry-run returns 0 due.

backend_new: GET /api/pastry/gallery returns items array with renders ✓
Gallery items have render_id, image_url, kind=photoreal_render ✓
PATCH changes persist in subsequent GET ✓
Dry-run does NOT create Stripe sessions (dry_run=True, no checkout_url) ✓
frontend_verified: /pastry/gallery favorite toggle persists via PATCH and survives reload ✓
/pastry/admin billing result panel appears after dry-run ✓
